metadata.description: Jon Gallant's collection of cross-agent skills for AI coding agents — GitHub Copilot, Claude, and Codex.

plugins.name: create-canvas-app
plugins.description: Build GitHub Copilot canvas extensions fast — a no-build Preact + htm kit with live SSE state, durable storage, Primer theming, official GitHub Lucide icons, a generator, and tests.

plugins.name: create-gh-pages-site
plugins.description: Scaffold a working GitHub Pages site from a vetted template (static, Astro, React + Vite, Eleventy, or Jekyll) into your current repo by default, inject the correct base path for the target repo, wire the official GitHub Actions Pages deploy workflow, set the repo's Website link, and explain how to enable Pages.

plugins.name: naming-is-hard
plugins.description: Interactive naming assistant: profile what you're building, explore on-brief candidate names while a preference model learns your taste, then validate against real availability (domains via DNS + RDAP, GitHub, npm/PyPI/crates/RubyGems/NuGet, social handles) plus a trademark and existing-business screen. Every finalist rolls up to one of three verdicts: Deal Breaker, It's Complicated, or Perfect Match.

plugins.name: repo-ready
plugins.description: Scaffold and maintain standard community health files for any GitHub repository. Two modes: init (interview, detect stack, scaffold everything) and update (scan for gaps, suggest additions). Generates .gitignore, .gitattributes, LICENSE, README, CONTRIBUTING, CODE_OF_CONDUCT, SECURITY, issue/PR templates, dependabot, CI workflows, CODEOWNERS, .editorconfig, and more.
